args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

clinical_data_raw = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-10747919647783005023'], 'r').read())
df_clinical = pd.DataFrame(clinical_data_raw)

# Extract ParticipantBarcode (first part of "Patient_description")
df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: x.split(' ')[1] if x.startswith('Patient TCGA-') else (x.split(', ')[0].split(' ')[2] if x.startswith('Case ') else (x.split(' ')[2] if x.startswith('Record ') else x.split(' ')[-2]))).str[:12]

# Filter for 'FEMALE' and 'Bladder urothelial carcinoma' and non-null histological_type
df_filtered_clinical = df_clinical[
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('FEMALE', na=False) &
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('Bladder urothelial carcinoma', na=False) &
    df_clinical['histological_type'].notna()
]

# Select relevant columns and drop duplicates based on ParticipantBarcode to avoid patient duplicates
df_final_clinical = df_filtered_clinical[['ParticipantBarcode', 'histological_type']].drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

print('__RESULT__:')
print(df_final_clinical.to_json(orient='records'))

import pandas as pd
import json

clinical_data_raw = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-10747919647783005023'], 'r').read())
df_clinical = pd.DataFrame(clinical_data_raw)

# Extract ParticipantBarcode (first part of "Patient_description")
df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(lambda x: x.split(' ')[1] if x.startswith('Patient TCGA-') else (x.split(', ')[0].split(' ')[2] if x.startswith('Case ') else (x.split(' ')[2] if x.startswith('Record ') else x.split(' ')[-2]))).str[:12]

# Filter for 'FEMALE' and 'Bladder urothelial carcinoma' and non-null histological_type
df_filtered_clinical = df_clinical[
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('FEMALE', na=False) &
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('Bladder urothelial carcinoma', na=False) &
    df_clinical['histological_type'].notna()
]

# Select relevant columns and drop duplicates based on ParticipantBarcode to avoid patient duplicates
df_final_clinical = df_filtered_clinical[['ParticipantBarcode', 'histological_type']].drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

print('__RESULT__:')
print(df_final_clinical.to_json(orient='records'))

args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json
import re

clinical_data_raw = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-10747919647783005023'], 'r').read())
df_clinical = pd.DataFrame(clinical_data_raw)

# Robustly extract ParticipantBarcode using regex
def extract_participant_barcode(description):
    match = re.search(r'TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4}', description)
    return match.group(0) if match else None

df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(extract_participant_barcode)

# Filter for 'FEMALE' and 'Bladder urothelial carcinoma' and non-null histological_type
df_filtered_clinical = df_clinical[
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('FEMALE', na=False) &
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('Bladder urothelial carcinoma', na=False) &
    df_clinical['histological_type'].notna() &
    df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'].notna()
]

# Select relevant columns and drop duplicates based on ParticipantBarcode to avoid patient duplicates
df_final_clinical = df_filtered_clinical[['ParticipantBarcode', 'histological_type']].drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

print('__RESULT__:')
print(df_final_clinical.to_json(orient='records'))

import pandas as pd
import json
import re

clinical_data_raw = json.loads(open(locals()['var_function-call-10747919647783005023'], 'r').read())
df_clinical = pd.DataFrame(clinical_data_raw)

# Robustly extract ParticipantBarcode using regex
def extract_participant_barcode(description):
    match = re.search(r'TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4}', description)
    return match.group(0) if match else None

df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'] = df_clinical['Patient_description'].apply(extract_participant_barcode)

# Filter for 'FEMALE' and 'Bladder urothelial carcinoma' and non-null histological_type
df_filtered_clinical = df_clinical[
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('FEMALE', na=False) &
    df_clinical['Patient_description'].str.contains('Bladder urothelial carcinoma', na=False) &
    df_clinical['histological_type'].notna() &
    df_clinical['ParticipantBarcode'].notna()
]

# Select relevant columns and drop duplicates based on ParticipantBarcode to avoid patient duplicates
df_final_clinical = df_filtered_clinical[['ParticipantBarcode', 'histological_type']].drop_duplicates(subset=['ParticipantBarcode'])

print('__RESULT__:')
print(df_final_clinical.to_json(orient='records'))
